channel.title: C — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on C (Citigroup) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: EXITED C (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) exited C in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Stanley Druckenmiller)

item.title: Bill Nygren: TRIMMED C (-27%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) trimmed C in Q4 2025 · 1.5% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Nygren)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED C (+15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added C in Q4 2025 · 0.4% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: TRIMMED C (-23%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) trimmed C in Q3 2025 · 1.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Nygren: ADDED C (+15%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) added C in Q3 2025 · 4.0% of portfolio. More Citigroup on turnaround.
